# Phormula

> Visual flashcards and smarter memorization — color-coded sets, interactive diagrams, and AI-generated study material.

Phormula helps students and lifelong learners memorize faster with beautiful color-coded flashcards, interactive diagram labeling, flowcharts, and AI-assisted study modes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and sign-up entry point.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or sign in to access study tools.
